tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(1,6): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'E'.

tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(2,5): error TS2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua(3,1): error TS1109: Expression expected.


==== tluaEnumSyntaxUnsupported.tlua (7 errors) ====
    enum E {
    ~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~

         ~
